title: How did Mrs. Sterling get her bag back?

meanings.usage: 指可能发生的危险或损失
用于固定或携带的细长条状物
因剧烈运动而喘不过气

examples.en: She ran through the forest to catch the thieves.
The two men rushed up to her while she was having a picnic.
examples.zh: 那两个男人趁她野餐时冲向她。

examples.en: They tried to steal her handbag.
examples.zh: 他们试图偷她的手提包。

examples.en: She was soon out of breath, but she continued to run.
examples.zh: 她很快气喘吁吁，但她继续跑。

examples.en: When she caught up with them, she saw they were going through the bag.
examples.zh: 当她追上他们时，她看到他们正在翻包。

examples.en: They were going through the contents of the bag.
examples.zh: 他们正在翻看包里的东西。

examples.en: The men got such a fright that they dropped the bag and ran away.
examples.zh: 那些男人吓得扔下包逃跑了。

examples.en: How did Mrs. Sterling get her bag back?
examples.zh: 斯特林夫人是怎么拿回她的包的？

examples.en: Mrs. Sterling did not think of the risk she was taking.
examples.zh: 斯特林夫人没有考虑到她所冒的风险。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或时间段正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述故事发生的背景或正在进行的动作，常与when/while等连用

examples.en: She was having a picnic at the edge of a forest.
The strap was breaking in the struggle.

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的过去发生的事情，常与before, after, when等连用

examples.en: She saw that they had sat down.
examples.zh: 她看到他们已经坐下了。

examples.en: She had run through the forest.

grammar.title: so...that结构 (结果状语从句)
grammar.definition: 表示如此...以至于，so后接形容词或副词，that后接结果状语从句
grammar.structure: so + 形容词/副词 + that + 结果从句
grammar.usage: 用于强调程度，说明由此产生的强烈结果

examples.en: Mrs. Sterling got so angry that she ran after them.
examples.zh: 斯特林夫人如此愤怒以至于她去追他们。

examples.en: The men got such a fright that they dropped the bag.
examples.zh: 那些男人吓得扔下了包。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + did not think of + the risk

original.en: Mrs. Anne Sterling did not think of the risk she was taking.
original.zh: 斯特林夫人没有考虑到她所冒的风险。

imitations.en: He did not think of the danger when he jumped into the river.
imitations.zh: 他跳进河里时没有考虑到危险。

imitations.en: The children did not think of the consequences.
imitations.zh: 孩子们没有考虑到后果。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be + out of breath

original.en: She was soon out of breath.

imitations.en: He was out of breath after running for ten minutes.
imitations.zh: 跑了十分钟后他气喘吁吁。

imitations.en: The boy was out of breath when he reached the top of the hill.
imitations.zh: 那个男孩到达山顶时气喘吁吁。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + see + that + 主语 + had + 过去分词

original.en: When she caught up with them, she saw that they had sat down.
original.zh: 当她追上他们时，她看到他们已经坐下了。

imitations.en: When I arrived, I saw that he had finished his homework.
imitations.zh: 当我到达时，我看到他已经完成了作业。

imitations.en: She saw that the thief had dropped the watch.
imitations.zh: 她看到小偷已经把手表掉了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: The + 名词 + needs + 动名词
